title: No password reset flow
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Sign up with email. 2. Sign out. 3. Cannot remember password. 4. No 'Forgot Password' option exists anywhere in the app.
suggested_fix: Add sendPasswordResetEmail() in ApiService; add 'Forgot Password' link on SignInScreen; create PasswordResetScreen with email input and success/error feedback.

title: No email verification
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Sign up with any fake email (e.g. fake@fake.fake). 2. Account is created and fully functional with no verification step.
suggested_fix: Call sendEmailVerification() after signup; gate feed access on emailVerified == true; show verification prompt screen.

title: Seller contact readable by any authenticated user
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Sign in with any account. 2. Use Firestore REST API or SDK to read sellers/{id}/private/contact. 3. Phone number returned without restriction.
suggested_fix: Change Firestore rule for sellers/{sellerId}/private/contact from 'allow read: if isAuthenticated()' to 'allow read: if false'. Route all reads through getSellerPhone Cloud Function.

title: No message sending rate limit
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open any chat conversation. 2. Send messages rapidly — no server-side limit enforced. 3. Hundreds of messages can be sent per minute.
suggested_fix: Add checkMessageRateLimit Cloud Function (30/min/UID). Call before sendMessage() in ApiService. Copy pattern from existing checkPublishRateLimit.

title: No account deletion feature
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Go to Profile or Settings screen. 2. Look for account deletion option. 3. No such option exists.
suggested_fix: Add 'Delete Account' button in Settings; call FirebaseAuth.instance.currentUser.delete() plus Firestore user data cleanup via Cloud Function.

title: Conversation deletion leaves orphan messages
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Delete a conversation from Messages screen. 2. Check Firestore — messages subcollection still exists under deleted conversation doc.
suggested_fix: Create Cloud Function trigger on conversation delete to recursively remove messages subcollection. Use firebase-admin batch delete.

title: use_build_context_synchronously warnings
steps_to_reproduce: 1. On SellScreen start publishing a listing with images. 2. Quickly tap the back button during upload. 3. Potential crash due to BuildContext used after async gap.
suggested_fix: Add 'if (!mounted) return;' checks before context usage after all async operations in preferences_screen.dart and sell_screen.dart.

title: No SSL pinning implemented
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Connect device to a proxy (e.g. mitmproxy) on same WiFi. 2. Intercept HTTPS traffic. 3. Firebase SDK traffic may be visible.
suggested_fix: Implement certificate pinning using SecurityContext or flutter_security_advisory plugin for Firebase endpoints.

title: Thumbnail uses signed URL with 2099 expiry
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Upload an item image. 2. Cloud Function generates thumbnail with getSignedUrl expiring in 2099. 3. URL cannot be revoked.
suggested_fix: Switch to Firebase Storage download tokens (getDownloadURL) or public URLs with Storage rules instead of long-lived signed URLs.

title: migrateDummyData() in production code
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open api_service.dart. 2. migrateDummyData() method is present and callable. 3. Could be accidentally invoked in production.
suggested_fix: Remove migrateDummyData() from ApiService or gate behind admin check / debug-only flag.

title: APK size 81 MB
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Build release APK. 2. APK is ~81 MB — larger than typical Flutter apps (15-30 MB).
suggested_fix: Build with --split-per-abi flag to reduce by ~50%. Add ProGuard/R8 rules. Audit asset sizes.

title: ReCaptcha test key hardcoded for web
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open main.dart line 34. 2. ReCaptcha provider uses Google's public test key. 3. Will not work in production web deployment.
suggested_fix: Replace test key with production ReCaptcha v3 site key from Google reCAPTCHA admin console.

title: .env file bundled as Flutter asset
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Check wavy/.env — tracked in git. 2. Currently only contains localhost URL. 3. Pattern invites future secret leaks.
suggested_fix: Move to .env.example with placeholder values. Add .env to .gitignore. Use dart-define for env-specific values.

title: Chat loads only 5 messages initially
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open a chat conversation with more than 5 messages. 2. Only 5 most recent messages visible. 3. Must manually load more.
suggested_fix: Increase initial message load from 5 to 20-30 in getMessages() API call.

title: Feed does not exclude already-swiped items
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Swipe through feed items. 2. Close and reopen app. 3. Same items appear again in feed.
suggested_fix: Track swiped item IDs per user (Firestore subcollection). Exclude swiped IDs from feed query using NOT IN or client-side filter.

title: No localization completeness check
steps_to_reproduce: 1. Switch app to Amharic. 2. Some strings use inline ternary instead of proper l10n framework. 3. Missing translations may show English fallback.
suggested_fix: Migrate all inline ternary locale checks to use AppLocalizations.of(context) with proper ARB files for en and am.
